portal_license_info.title: Portal Subscription Validity is About to Expire!
portal_license_info.message:
Dear Sir/Mam,
                I hope you have wonderful day !
                Greetings from SuryaLogix..!!
                We are confident that you are satisfied with the performance & service of SuryaLogix Solutions.
                I would like to remind you that the Portal Subscription Validity on your SuryaLogix system is about to expire on 02-04-2026.
                So, kindly request you to renew the Portal Subscription Validity at the earliest to continue the services seamlessly and without any interruption.
                Please contact to below no. and mail ids:-
                Phone: +91 9022101637 / +91 9022928497 / +91 8799957277
                Email: sales3@suryalogix.com
